case_title: AUSTIN FRANK RIDLEY VS. IMPARK PACIFIC PARKING LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF AUSTIN FRANK RIDLEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IMPARK PACIFIC PARKING LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY ; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - IMPARK PACIFIC PARKING LLC.; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED T O SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD; ALSO HANDWRITTEN NOTE: "MOVED")
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY RIDLEY, AUSTIN FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT IMPARK PACIFIC PARKING LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURN MAIL : SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER, SENT TO DEFENDANT. UNABLE TO FORWARD.
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER , SENT TO DEFENDANT , UNABLE TO FORWARD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIDLEY, AUSTIN FRANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IMPARK PACIFIC PARKING LLC $3,339.19 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,339.19, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY TO THE COURT $65.00 PER GOVT. CODE 68637 (B). DAMAGES BASED UPON ATTACHMENT.( *SEE ATTACHED TALLY OF EXPENSES.*) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
